signals.label: Narrator scaffolding
signals.regex: \b(it'?s (important|worth) (to note|noting)|it should be noted|let'?s (dive|explore|take a look)|as we can see|keep in mind that)\b

signals.label: Bookend boilerplate
signals.regex: \b(in (today'?s|this|an) (fast[- ]?paced|ever[- ]?(changing|evolving)|digital|modern) (world|age|landscape|era)|in conclusion|at the end of the day|when it comes to)\b

signals.label: Unwarranted absolutes
signals.regex: \b(undoubtedly|without a doubt|unquestionably|every single|bar none|hands down|guaranteed to)\b

signals.label: Dead metaphor & reified abstraction
signals.regex: \b(take[s]? root|grow[s]? into|blossom[s]? into|hold[s]? space for|prop[s]? up|plant the seeds of|a growing body of|move (the|a) needle|low[- ]hanging fruit|circle back|boil the ocean)\b

signals.label: Empty category shell
signals.regex: \b(the whole \w+ thing|as a concept|the (notion|idea) of|the world of \w+)\b

signals.label: Staccato triad (short one-word sentences for drama)
